title: Problems encountered when using natural right join and dataformat functions together
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 CHAR UNIQUE ) AUTO_ID_CACHE 100 ;
ALTER TABLE t0  CHANGE c0 c0 CHAR NOT NULL ;
ALTER TABLE t0  ORDER BY c0 ASC;
ALTER TABLE t1  CHANGE c0 c0 CHAR NOT NULL ;
ALTER TABLE t0 MODIFY c0 NUMERIC;
key_bug_features: NATURAL RIGHT JOIN with DATE_FORMAT function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 INT NOT NULL, c2 DATE DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t3(c3 CHAR(10) NOT NULL, c4 FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO t3(c3, c4) VALUES ('A', 1.5), ('B', NULL), ('C', 3.0);
SELECT t2.c1, t3.c3 FROM t2 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN t3 WHERE (NOT (DATE_FORMAT(t2.c2, '%Y-%m-%d') IS NULL));
